title: Revise an incident postmortem for a faster executive readout
prompt: Revise this postmortem into a 4-slide executive readout. Keep the impact and prevention plan, but reduce operational detail and make the deck easier to scan in a leadership meeting.
acceptanceNotes: The revision should compress detail without hiding the operational failure.
The prevention plan should remain concrete.
The result should read like a second-pass executive summary rather than a new incident deck.
